title: Paper Manifest v2
$comment: Documentary contract for paper_manifest.json artifacts written by packages/hep-mcp/src/core/export/exportPaperScaffold.ts. The TypeScript type generated from this schema (PaperManifestV2 in packages/shared/src/generated/) is intentionally not imported by name; the schema serves as the canonical artifact-format reference for both runtime writers and tests.

schemaVersion.description: 1 = legacy manifest (version always 1, parent_version and review_ref always null). 2 = versioned manifest with real version, parent_version, and review_ref.
